name: two-pass reconciler routes a novel classification to a pending-rule entry awaiting evidence aggregation before promotion
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p3","matched_rule_id":null,"classification":"novel"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/apply-classification.sh" --decision decision.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'action=pending-rule' out.txt && grep -q 'awaiting=evidence' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
